_publications._publicationTitle: Mouse low-grade gliomas contain cancer stem cells with unique molecular and functional properties.

_contextSnippet: cells from Nf1 flox/flox (WT) and Nf1+/− mice took nearly 3 weeks to form smaller clusters, which could not be maintained by serial passaging due to loss of proliferation and self-renewal ability
